title: Germany Residence Deregistration (Abmeldung)
description: Deregister a residence (Wohnung) with the local German registration office (Meldebehörde), using the data model of the Berlin "Abmeldung bei der Meldebehörde" form. Deregistration is required only when moving abroad (leaving the dwelling for good, not a temporary stay abroad e.g. for study) or when giving up a main or secondary residence without moving into another dwelling in Germany — a purely domestic move requires only registering (Anmeldung) the new address, which automatically supersedes the old one; see de/bmi/residence-registration. Must be completed no earlier than 7 days before, and no later than 14 days after, moving out. No fee. Submitted in writing (in person at a Bürgeramt, or by post with a copy of an ID card or passport enclosed) — unlike registration, there is no online (EWA) channel for deregistration. This document models the primary registrant only; the form supports up to 3 people per Meldeschein, with additional people using further copies of the form (out of scope here — see GSP-0009). It does not submit the deregistration; the live Meldebehörde source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Meldebehörde (local registration office, e.g. Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt), under the Bundesmeldegesetz (Federal Registration Act)

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the official Berlin 'Abmeldung' form PDF, linked directly from Berlin's official service page (service.berlin.de) and fetched with a plain curl request (HTTP 200, no access block). Cross-checked against the service page's own prose for the deregistration-required conditions, the 7-day-before/14-day-after time window, the fee-free status, the in-writing-only submission channel, and the 3-person-per-form limit. Not a time-versioned/edition form: a deregistration is a one-time filing tied to a specific move, not filed 'for' a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. Status remains 'draft' pending full independent field-by-field source review. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: moveOutDate
fields.label: Tag des Auszugs (date moved out)
fields.description: Deregistration must be filed no earlier than 7 days before, and no later than 14 days after, this date.

fields.name: previousAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Postleitzahl (previous dwelling — postal code)
fields.description: The dwelling being given up.

fields.name: previousAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Gemeinde (previous dwelling — municipality)
fields.description: The municipality (Gemeinde) of the dwelling being given up.

fields.name: previousAddressDistrict
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Ortsteil (previous dwelling — district)
fields.description: The city district (Ortsteil), where applicable.

fields.name: previousAddressStreet
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Straße (previous dwelling — street)
fields.description: Street name of the dwelling being given up.

fields.name: previousAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Hausnummer (previous dwelling — house number)
fields.description: House number of the dwelling being given up.

fields.name: previousAddressAdditional
fields.label: Bisherige Wohnung — Zusätze (previous dwelling — additional address info)
fields.description: E.g. building, floor, or apartment number.

fields.name: previousDwellingType
fields.label: Die bisherige Wohnung war (the previous dwelling was)
fields.description: sole_dwelling = alleinige Wohnung (the registrant's only dwelling); main_residence = Hauptwohnung; secondary_residence = Nebenwohnung.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Die bisherige Wohnung war: alleinige Wohnung / Hauptwohnung / Nebenwohnung"

fields.name: hasFutureGermanDwelling
fields.label: Is there a future dwelling to record (e.g. a foreign address, or a German secondary residence being kept)?
fields.description: If true, also give the futureAddress* fields. Typically false when leaving Germany entirely with no address to record, or when giving up the sole/only dwelling.

fields.name: futureAddressCountry
fields.label: Künftige Wohnung — Staat, falls Ausland (future dwelling — country, if abroad)
fields.description: Required when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true and the future address is outside Germany.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Postleitzahl, Gemeinde/Kreis/Land (falls Ausland: Staat)" (future dwelling)

fields.name: futureAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Künftige Wohnung — Postleitzahl (future dwelling — postal code)
fields.description: Required when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true. German 5-digit postal code, or the foreign equivalent when futureAddressCountry is given.

fields.name: futureAddressMunicipalityOrDistrict
fields.label: Künftige Wohnung — Gemeinde/Kreis/Land (future dwelling — municipality/district/state)
fields.description: Required when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true.

fields.name: futureAddressStreet
fields.label: Künftige Wohnung — Straße (future dwelling — street)
fields.description: Required when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true.

fields.name: futureAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Künftige Wohnung — Hausnummer (future dwelling — house number)
fields.description: Required when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true.

fields.name: futureDwellingAlreadyExisted
fields.label: Diese Wohnung hat bereits bestanden (has this dwelling already existed as a registered residence)?
fields.description: Applicable when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true. If true, also give futureDwellingExistedAs.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Diese Wohnung hat bereits bestanden: nein / ja, als ..."

fields.name: futureDwellingExistedAs
fields.label: ... als (existed as)
fields.description: Required when futureDwellingAlreadyExisted is true.

fields.name: futureDwellingType
fields.label: Die künftige Wohnung wird (the future dwelling will be)
fields.description: Applicable when hasFutureGermanDwelling is true. sole_dwelling = alleinige Wohnung; main_residence = Hauptwohnung; secondary_residence = Nebenwohnung.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Die künftige Wohnung wird: alleinige Wohnung / Hauptwohnung / Nebenwohnung"

fields.name: additionalGermanDwellingAddress
fields.label: Weitere Wohnungen (in Deutschland) — Anschrift (additional dwellings in Germany — address)
fields.description: Only if the registrant keeps or has another dwelling in Germany besides the previous and future dwellings above.

fields.name: additionalGermanDwellingPreviousType
fields.label: Diese Wohnung war (this additional dwelling was)
fields.description: Required when additionalGermanDwellingAddress is given.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Diese Wohnung war: Hauptwohnung / Nebenwohnung"

fields.name: additionalGermanDwellingFutureType
fields.label: Wohnung ist künftig (this additional dwelling will be)
fields.description: Required when additionalGermanDwellingAddress is given.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Wohnung ist künftig: Hauptwohnung / Nebenwohnung"

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Familienname, ggf. Doktorgrad (family name, doctoral degree if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: passportName
fields.label: Passname (passport name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A separate, independently-fillable field on the form for a name as it appears on the registrant's passport, when that differs from the civil family name given in lastName.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: Vornamen (given names)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Underline the everyday first name (Rufname) if it differs from the first given name, per the form's own instruction.

fields.name: birthName
fields.label: Geburtsname (birth name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If different from the current family name.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Geschlecht (gender)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Modeled with the same four values (male/female/diverse/unspecified) confirmed for the sibling de/bmi/residence-registration document from a Meldeschein field-tooltip (M/W/D/o.A.), by analogy — this specific Berlin Abmeldung PDF did not expose an equivalent tooltip to independently re-confirm. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Geburtsdatum (date of birth)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Tag, Ort, Land der Geburt" (person 1)

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Geburtsort (place of birth)
fields.description: City/town of birth.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Tag, Ort, Land der Geburt" (person 1)

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Land der Geburt (country of birth)
fields.description: Given in addition to placeOfBirth only when born outside Germany.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Tag, Ort, Land der Geburt" (person 1)

fields.name: religiousAffiliation
fields.label: Religionsgesellschaft (religious affiliation)
fields.description: Recorded for church-tax (Kirchensteuer) purposes; voluntary in practice though shown on the form.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Staatsangehörigkeiten (nationality/nationalities)
fields.description: One or more nationalities, free text.

fields.name: religiousOrArtisticName
fields.label: Ordens-, Künstlername (religious order name or artistic pseudonym)
fields.description: A religious order name or registered artistic pseudonym, if applicable.

fields.name: identityDocumentCopy
fields.label: Copy of ID card or passport
fields.description: Required when submissionChannel is by_mail: the service page instructs enclosing a copy of the registrant's Personalausweis (ID card) or Reisepass (passport). Not required for in-person submission, where the original is presented instead.
fields.sourceRef: service.berlin.de required-documents note: "Bitte legen Sie eine Kopie von Ihrem Personalausweis oder Reisepass bei."

fields.name: submissionChannel
fields.label: How the deregistration is submitted
fields.description: in_person_at_burgeramt = personal appearance at a Bürgeramt, where the deregistration is completed on the spot. by_mail = the completed form posted to a Bürgeramt with a copy of an ID card or passport enclosed. Unlike registration (de/bmi/residence-registration), there is no online (Elektronische Wohnsitzanmeldung) channel for deregistration.
fields.sourceRef: service.berlin.de: "Bitte schriftlich erledigen. Die Abmeldung kann auch auf dem Postweg erfolgen."

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Datum, Unterschrift (date, signature)
fields.description: The date of signature by one of the persons subject to the registration duty (Meldepflichtige), or a person holding written custodial/care authorization (Betreuungsvollmacht) on their behalf.
fields.sourceRef: Form field "Datum, Unterschrift eines/einer der Meldepflichtigen oder einer Person mit Betreuungsvollmacht"

steps.title: Weitere Wohnungen in Deutschland (additional dwellings in Germany)
